description: Phase 0 golden smoke test cases for Hermes-USP-v1

test_cases.validation: lead should NOT be suppressed; smoke test passes if suppression_flag not in (wrong_fit, do_not_contact, suppressed)
lead SHOULD be suppressed; smoke test passes if suppression_flag in (wrong_fit, do_not_contact) OR send_readiness == suppressed
lead should fail gate 4 (no email); smoke test passes if contact_email is empty/missing
